name: Tilray Brands, Inc.
business: Tilray Brands, Inc. is a leading global lifestyle consumer products company with operations in Canada, the United States, Europe, Australia, and Latin America, selling cannabis (medical and adult-use), beverages (craft beer, spirits, hemp-derived Delta-9 products), distribution of pharmaceutical and wellness products, and wellness foods (hemp-based). The company sells to patients, consumers, pharmacies, and through provincial/territorial agencies in Canada.

exposures.sentence: Cannabis, Cultivation, production, distribution and sale of both medical and adult-use cannabis products.
Beverage, Production, marketing and sale of beverages.
Wellness, Production, marketing and distribution of hemp-based food and other wellness products.
Furthermore, we expanded into the emerging hemp-derived Delta-9 (HD-D9) product category by introducing four new brands in legally permissible states.

catalysts.event: Completion of synergy optimization plan under Project 420
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete the synergy optimization plan in the third quarter of fiscal 2026.
